purpose: Deterministic golden question set for evaluating Paradiso AI routing, detection, grounding, and fallback behavior without calling real LLM providers.
notes: These questions test deterministic backend helpers only: _detect_visa_codes, _detect_task_type, _risk_level_for_task, _select_grounding.
expected_grounding_status reflects what _select_grounding currently returns, not the coverage matrix aspiration.
candidate_only items are known gaps: grounding is not active, but the matrix has a draft candidate pending human review.
Questions must not contain real personal data (passport numbers, real names, ARC numbers, phone numbers).

questions.question: D-2 비자 체류기간 연장 신청은 어떻게 하나요?
questions.notes: Core D-2 extension case. Text-detectable via regex. Should select active grounding entry.

questions.question: 유학생인데 비자 연장 신청 서류가 궁금합니다. D-2입니다.
questions.notes: D-2 extension via payload visa_code override. '연장' signal triggers extension task type.

questions.question: D-4 어학연수 비자 체류기간 연장하려면 어떤 서류가 필요한가요?
questions.notes: D-4 general extension. Text-detectable. General entry covers D-4-1 and D-4-7; no sub-code in payload so general entry is returned.

questions.question: 한국어 어학원에서 D-4-1으로 공부 중인데 체류 연장 신청을 하고 싶어요.
questions.notes: D-4-1 sub-code in payload. General entry covers D-4-1; should select active grounding.

questions.question: D-4-2K 비자로 연수 중인데 체류기간 연장 방법이 알고 싶습니다.
questions.notes: D-4-2K is explicitly NOT covered by the active D-4 grounding entry. Must fall back to scoped prompt.

questions.question: How do I extend my E-7 visa in Korea?
questions.notes: E-7 extension in English. Text-detectable. Should select active grounding entry.

questions.question: My E-7 special occupation visa is expiring soon and I need to know the renewal documents.
questions.notes: 'renewal' triggers extension task type. E-7 text-detectable.

questions.question: I have an E-7-4 skilled worker visa. How do I extend my stay?
questions.notes: E-7-4 is explicitly NOT covered by the general E-7 grounding entry. Must fall through to scoped fallback.

questions.question: I have an F-6-1 visa and my husband and I are getting divorced. What happens to my visa status?
questions.notes: F-6-1 divorce. grounding_selected=False (task_type != extension, and F-6 not in _GROUNDED_VISA_CODES). Matrix says scoped_fallback for f6_1; candidate_only for f6_divorce_status_change_general. Known gap — reported but does not fail in non-strict mode.

questions.question: My F-6 visa was issued as a spouse of a Korean national and we are now separated. Can I stay in Korea?
questions.notes: F-6 separation — 'separated' triggers marriage_divorce_status_change. _select_grounding returns None. Known gap.

questions.question: F-6-3 비자인데 이혼 후 체류 연장은 어떻게 하나요?
questions.notes: F-6-3 finalized divorce Korean. '이혼' triggers marriage_divorce_status_change. Candidate exists but not promoted. _select_grounding returns None.

questions.question: 한국인 남편과 이혼이 최종 확정되었는데 F-6-3 체류 자격으로 계속 한국에 있을 수 있나요?
questions.notes: F-6-3 finalized divorce Korean variant. '이혼' keyword detected.

questions.question: 이혼 후 한국인 자녀를 양육 중인데 F-6-2 체류 연장이 가능한가요?
questions.notes: F-6-2 child raising. Matrix says clarification_needed. No candidate, no grounding. '이혼' detected.

questions.question: I am on a D-2 student visa and planning to take a leave of absence. What do I need to report to immigration?
questions.notes: 'leave of absence' triggers academic_status_change. D-2 text-detectable. Must NOT select D-2 extension grounding.

questions.question: My D-2 visa is valid but I want to take a gap semester. Does my visa status change?
questions.notes: 'gap semester' triggers academic_status_change. Confirms leave-of-absence is NOT routed to extension grounding.

questions.question: D-2 비자로 유학 중인데 휴학을 하면 어떻게 되나요?
questions.notes: '휴학' triggers academic_status_change in Korean. Must NOT select D-2 extension grounding entry.

questions.question: I am finishing my degree on a D-2 visa and will graduate next month. What are my stay options?
questions.notes: Known gap: 'graduate' is not in academic_status_change detection signals. Task type is null. Maps to d2_graduation_completion matrix row but the signal 'graduation'/'graduate' is not yet wired in _detect_task_type.

questions.question: D-2 유학 비자 상태에서 학적 상태가 변동되면 어떻게 해야 하나요?
questions.notes: '학적 상태' is in academic_ko signals ('학적 상태'). Maps to d2_graduation_completion scenario.

questions.question: D-10 구직 비자 체류기간 연장 신청 방법이 어떻게 되나요?
questions.notes: D-10 not in _GROUNDED_VISA_CODES. Text detection only covers D-2/D-4/E-7. visa_code in payload only. '연장' triggers extension.

questions.question: D-10-1 비자 연장을 신청하고 싶습니다. 필요한 서류가 무엇인가요?
questions.notes: D-10-1 sub-code via payload. D-10 not grounded. Falls to scoped fallback.

questions.question: I have an E-7 visa and want to change employer. What is the process?
questions.notes: 'change employer' (without 'my') matches the regex pattern. _select_grounding only matches task_type=extension so falls through to scoped fallback.

questions.question: E-7 비자 소지자인데 직장을 바꾸려고 합니다. 근무처 변경 신고는 어떻게 하나요?
questions.notes: '직장을 바꾸' triggers workplace_change. _select_grounding returns None.

questions.question: F-2 거주 비자 체류기간 연장 신청 절차가 궁금합니다.
questions.notes: F-2 not in _GROUNDED_VISA_CODES. '연장' triggers extension. Falls to scoped fallback.

questions.question: How do I extend my F-2 residence visa? My stay period is ending in two months.
questions.notes: 'extend' triggers extension. F-2 payload-only visa code detection.

questions.question: F-5 영주권자인데 영주증 갱신은 어떻게 하나요?
questions.notes: Known gap: '갱신' is not in the extension detection signals (only '연장', '체류기간 연장' etc. are). Matrix row expected_task_type is also null for F-5 card renewal. F-5 card renewal is a different procedure from extension.

questions.question: My F-5 permanent resident card is expiring. How do I renew it?
questions.notes: 'renew' triggers extension. F-5 not grounded.

questions.question: I moved to a new apartment. How do I report my address change to Korean immigration?
questions.notes: 'address change' triggers address_report. No visa code in text or payload.

questions.question: 이사를 했는데 출입국에 체류지 변경신고를 어떻게 하나요?
questions.notes: '이사를 했' triggers address_report in Korean.

questions.question: I renewed my passport. How do I report new passport information to Korean immigration?
questions.notes: 'report new passport information' matches 'report (?:new|renewed|reissued) passport' regex (without 'the' between 'report' and 'new').

questions.question: 여권을 새로 발급받았습니다. 여권 재발급 신고는 어디에 해야 하나요?
questions.notes: '여권 재발급 신고' triggers passport_info_report.

questions.question: I just arrived in Korea on a student visa and need to complete foreigner registration.
questions.notes: Known gap: backend has no foreigner_registration detector in _detect_task_type. task_type_detected=null is expected and reported as a gap, not a failure.

questions.question: 한국에 처음 입국했는데 외국인등록은 어디에서 하나요?
questions.notes: Known gap: '외국인등록' is not yet a detection signal in _detect_task_type. Expected null task type.

questions.question: I want to change my visa status from D-2 to E-7. What is the process?
questions.notes: 'change my visa status' triggers status_change (higher priority than extension). risk_level=high per _TASK_RISK_LEVELS.

questions.question: D-2에서 E-7으로 체류자격 변경허가를 받으려면 어떻게 해야 하나요?
questions.notes: '체류자격 변경허가' triggers status_change in Korean.

questions.question: I am on a D-2 visa. Can I do part-time work outside my current visa status?
questions.notes: Known gap: no 체류자격외활동 detector exists in _detect_task_type. task_type=null expected.

questions.question: D-2 비자인데 체류자격외 활동허가를 받아 아르바이트를 하려면 어떻게 하나요?
questions.notes: Known gap: '체류자격외 활동' not yet a detection signal.

questions.question: My visa expired two days ago. I did not apply for an extension in time. What should I do?
questions.notes: 'visa expired' triggers overstay_deadline_risk. High risk. No grounding for this type.

questions.question: 체류 만료일이 지났습니다. 초과체류가 되면 어떻게 해야 하나요?
questions.notes: '체류 만료' and '초과체류' both trigger overstay_deadline_risk.

questions.question: I had a child born in Korea last week. Do I need to report the birth to immigration?
questions.notes: 'had a child' matches '(?:had|born) a child' regex in family_status_change detection.

questions.question: 자녀 출생 신고를 출입국에도 해야 하나요?
questions.notes: '자녀 출생 신고' triggers family_status_change in Korean.

questions.question: How do I apply for a US green card?
questions.notes: Out of scope — US green card is not Korean immigration. No visa code, no task type detected. Grounding not selected. Fallback prompt should exclude USCIS reference.

questions.question: 한국 날씨는 어떤가요?
questions.notes: Completely off-topic question — no task type, no visa code, no grounding. Tests that the system does not crash on unrelated input.

questions.question: How do I extend my D-2 visa?
questions.notes: D-2 detected from free text (text detection covers D-2). 'extend' triggers extension. Should ground.

questions.question: E-7 비자 체류기간 연장 신청을 하고 싶습니다. 어떤 서류가 필요한가요?
questions.notes: E-7 text-detectable. '연장' triggers extension. Grounds via active entry.

questions.question: D-4 비자 연장하고 싶어요.
questions.notes: D-4 text-detectable. No sub-code. '연장' triggers extension. General entry (no sub-code required) should be returned.
